perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a woman in a black dress standing in a Costco warehouse in front of a stack of 'Great Day' brand almond soup boxes; she is gesturing and talking excitedly to the camera. (2) The scene cuts to close-up shots of the product packaging, specifically the 'Snow Fungus Almond Soup with Oats'. (3) The setting shifts to an indoor kitchen/living room where two women are seated at a table with a bowl of the product. (4) One woman pours the creamy white soup from a pink and white pouch into a large glass bowl, then stirs it with a ladle to reveal the chunky texture of snow fungus and oats. (5) Throughout the tasting, the women use hand gestures like thumbs up and pointing to emphasize the richness of the soup while maintaining smiling and expressive facial expressions.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-energy, upbeat electronic background music plays throughout. (2) Two female voices are heard; one is a primary narrator speaking with a bright, enthusiastic tone, and another joins in during the indoor review section. (3) Sound effects (SFX) such as 'dings' and 'pops' coincide with the appearance of text overlays. (4) The audio transitions from a slightly echoing warehouse environment to a clearer, studio-like indoor recording with minimal ambient noise.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) 'COSTCO WHOLESALE' logo appears at the top throughout the first half. (2) '杏仁味超濃厚!' (Strong almond flavor!) is shown as decorative hook text. (3) '銀耳燕麥杏仁露' (Snow Fungus Oat Almond Soup) serves as the main product title. (4) '得意的一天' (Great Day) is the brand name prominently displayed. (5) Functional text includes pricing details like '這一箱399元' (399 NTD per box) and '每一包是133塊' (133 NTD per pouch). (6) Emotional stickers like '很濃郁' (Very rich) and '很過癮' (Very satisfying) appear in a variety-show style.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro at retail store -> Close-up product showcase -> Home tasting and price breakdown -> Final recommendation

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 2 female creators appearing onscreen together during the review portion.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: One woman wears a black dress with a headband; the other wears a brown/grey top with a zebra-patterned bucket hat.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The first scene is a crowded Costco warehouse with industrial shelving; the second scene is a home interior with a table and plush toys in the background.
visual_scene_and_style.lightingStyle: Bright studio lights mixed with natural indoor lighting.
visual_scene_and_style.season: Summer (implied by text mentioning cold eating)

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Linear: Hook -> Intro -> Demo -> Evaluation -> CTA
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To provide a positive consumer review and recommendation for the 'Great Day' Snow Fungus Almond Soup available at Costco, emphasizing its rich texture, large portions suitable for families, and overall value for money.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct recommendation of the product, display of the price, and positive taste test reaction.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: High-density variety-show style text overlays and repetitive 'Great Day' branding.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video targets Costco shoppers and health-conscious dessert lovers in the Taiwan market.
